parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets the rising-edge threshold for clk

parameters.name: taperture
parameters.override_behavior: sets the delay from each rising clk crossing to the vin capture instant

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic rising-edge arming and delayed event-driven capture.
Keep held state updates separate from the continuous vout contribution.
Treat VDD and VSS as observable supply context only; do not clamp, scale, or shift the held vin value with those rails.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: At initialization, the held output is established from the initial observed vin value.
Each rising crossing of clk through vth arms exactly one sample for the corresponding delayed aperture instant.
At taperture after the rising clk crossing, vout captures the vin value present at that delayed instant rather than at the clock edge.
Between delayed aperture instants, vout retains the most recently captured value and does not track vin.
VDD and VSS are public supply-observation ports for harness compatibility only; they do not clamp, scale, or shift the captured vin value.
Changes in the held value appear on vout with finite transition smoothing set by tedge.

title: Aperture Delay Track And Hold
